case_title: HERNANDEZ, ROY VS TALMADGE, ARLENE R et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY HERNANDEZ, ROY AS TO DEFENDANT TALMADGE, ARLENE R RYDER TRUCK RENTAL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-11-1999 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT RYDER TRUCK RENTAL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HERNANDEZ, ROY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TALMADGE, ARLENE R RYDER TRUCK RENTAL JUDGMENT IS AGAINST DEFT. TALMAGE IN THE AMOUNT OF $3500. FOR PERSONAL INJUDRY & PROPERTY DAMAGE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
DEFT TALMAGE IS TO PAY $1000 PER MONTH BEGINNING 1/16/99. PAYMENTS DUE BY 1/16/99 OF EACH MONTH UNTIL JUDGMENT PAID IN FULL. JUDGMENT AGAINST,
RYDER TRUCK RENTAL IN THE AMT OF $4300, PLUS COST OF $46, TO THE EXTENT RYDER CAN ASSIST IN THE RE- LEASE OF PLFT VEH FROM B OF A BACK TO PLFT
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT TALMADGE, ARLENE R RYDER TRUCK RENTAL
